sections.label: ASSISTANT
sections.content: World model: Level 3. Player at (8, 14), target at (8, 8). Going UP from (6, 10) to (4, 10) caused game over. Need to find alternative path. Let me try going UP from (6, 12) instead of (6, 10).

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Try: UP, LEFT, UP (go to (4, 12) instead of (4, 10))
result = action(['UP', 'LEFT', 'UP'])
print(f"Result: {last_action_result}")

ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
player_pos = None
for i, line in enumerate(ascii_lines):
    for j, ch in enumerate(line):
        if ch == 'c':
            player_pos = (i, j)
            break
    if player_pos: break
print(f"Player: {player_pos}")
if player_pos:
    cell_r = (player_pos[0] - 18) // 3
    cell_c = (player_pos[1] - 0) // 3
    print(f"Player cell: ({cell_r}, {cell_c})")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
